hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); process.stdin.resume(); let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse(d); const fp=j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path||''; if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(fp)){ require('child_process').execSync('npx prettier --write "'+fp+'"',{stdio:'pipe'}); } }catch(e){} process.exit(0); });"

node -e "process.stdin.resume(); let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse(d); const fp=j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path||''; const blocked=['.env','.env.local','package-lock.json']; if(blocked.some(b=>fp.endsWith(b))){ process.stderr.write('BLOQUEADO: '+fp+' es un archivo protegido. No modificar directamente.'); process.exit(2); } }catch(e){} process.exit(0); });"
